name: maxvision-linkedin
description: MaxVision LinkedIn Suite — 15 LinkedIn automation tools (search/apply/profile/feed/optimize/companies/employees/posts) via hosted MCP server.

plugins.name: linkedin-maxvision
plugins.description: LinkedIn automation suite: 15 tools (search_jobs, get_profile, get_company_info, search_companies, find_company_employees, get_profile_activity, monitor_post_engagement, search_people, list_feed, post_update, apply_easy, send_message, optimize_profile, get_job_details, track_application). Apify-backed (harvestapi catalog). Free / Pro / Agency tiers via Stripe license.
